title: crotalaria kwengeensis var. kwengeensis
intro: Crotalaria kwengeensis var. kwengeensis is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea or bean family, and is native to Zambia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, which contribute to its various health benefits. These benefits include the treatment of various infections, reduction of fever, and relief from pain. Crotalaria kwengeensis var. kwengeensis is typically used in traditional medicine and can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or ointment, allowing for various herbal preparations to be made from its roots and leaves.
